case_title: NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC VS. CARL RICCITELLI

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC
